label: Quick Trade
description: Market selector and trade entry form with Kelly stake suggestion and position size controls.

1.1.note: — markets, quickTradeMarketId, placeTrade read exclusively via usePredictionsData() hook.

1.2.note: — context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3-1.5 N/A — trade panel displays the global market catalogue for market selection; the catalogue is not scoped by org/client/strategy. placeTrade() is an action, not a data display.

knownIssues.description: Market catalogue shown in selector is global — not filtered by org/client/strategy scope. Trade panel is an action widget; 1.3–1.5 marked N/A.
Reference data (MOCK_MARKETS) lives in lib/mocks/fixtures/ rather than lib/constants/; moving is future scope.
